nasb.text: When the wicked increase, transgression increases; But the righteous will see their fall.

esv.text: When the wicked increase, transgression increases, but the righteous will look upon their downfall.

cnv.text: 惡人增多的時候，過犯也必增多； 義人必看見他們傾覆。

ccb.text: 恶人当道，罪恶泛滥； 义人必得见他们败亡。

csbs.text: 恶人增多时，过犯就增多； 但义人将看见恶人败亡。
